Metadata.title: Vectorial Data — Stock Portfolio
Metadata.description: Stock picks focused on dividends and capital appreciation. Updated daily.

Home.heroSubtitle: Every time someone buys a product from your companies, you earn money. They're called dividends. We pick the companies for you.
Home.heroProof: 7 picks per week · Full research · Straight to your WhatsApp
Home.problemTitle: You know you should be investing.
Home.problemSubtitle: But you don't know where to start.
Home.noiseDesc: Thousands of stocks, hundreds of opinions. You don't know which to buy.
Home.noTimeDesc: Analyzing a stock takes hours. You have a job, a family, a life.
Home.fearDesc: Without guidance, investing feels like gambling. It shouldn't be that way.
Home.step1Desc: Every day you get a selected company straight to your WhatsApp. Full research included.
Home.step2Desc: $3, $5, $50 — whatever you can. You buy a fraction and you're already an owner of that company.
Home.step3Desc: Companies pay you for being an owner. Every quarter you receive money in your account. Automatic.
Home.featuresTitle: Everything you need to earn income
Home.feature2: Companies that pay dividends every quarter
Home.pricingSubtitle: One dollar a month. No catch.
Home.faq1A: They're payments companies make to you for being a shareholder. You buy a fraction of Coca-Cola, and every time someone buys a Coke, a portion of that profit goes to your account. It's that simple.
Home.faq2Q: How much do I need to start investing?
Home.faq2A: $3 per pick is enough. You buy a fraction of the stock and you're already an owner. The key is being consistent.
Home.faq3A: No. This is educational and informational. Always consult a financial advisor before investing.
Home.faq4Q: How do I receive the picks?
Home.faq4A: Straight to your WhatsApp, every day Monday through Friday. It includes the ticker, a summary, and a link to the full research.
Home.faq5A: Yes, at any time. No penalty, no questions asked.
Home.ctaTitle: Your next pick goes out tomorrow.
Home.ctaDisclaimer: Vectorial Data — Stock Portfolio. This is not financial advice.

Join.title: Start earning income
Join.subtitle: Receive daily picks on your WhatsApp. Companies that pay you dividends for being an owner. Full research included.
Join.pricingSubtitle: One dollar a month. No catch.
Join.feature1: Daily pick with full research (7 per week)
Join.feature2: Companies that pay dividends every quarter
Join.faq1A: They're payments companies make to you for being a shareholder. You buy a fraction of a company, and every quarter you receive money in your account from the profits it generated.
Join.faq2Q: How many picks do I get per week?
Join.faq2A: 7 picks per week: 2 on Monday, 2 on Tuesday, 1 on Wednesday, 1 on Thursday, 1 on Friday. We alternate between new companies and rebuys in cycles of 5.
Join.faq3Q: What kind of companies do you select?
Join.faq3A: Companies that generate cash flow through dividends AND have appreciation potential. Quality businesses with solid fundamentals across all sectors and regions.
Join.faq4A: No. This is educational and informational. Always consult a financial advisor before investing.
Join.faq5Q: How do I receive the picks?
Join.faq5A: Straight to your WhatsApp. You receive a summary of each pick with a link to the full research on our website.
